name: io.github.supertone-inc/supertone-mcp
title: Supertone TTS
description: High-quality Supertone TTS: voice search, preview, duration prediction, and voice cloning

environmentVariables.name: SUPERTONE_MCP_VOICE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default voice_id for synthesis (falls back to a preset voice)

environmentVariables.name: SUPERTONE_OUTPUT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory where audio files are saved (default ~/supertone-tts-output/)

environmentVariables.name: SUPERTONE_MCP_OUTPUT_MODE
environmentVariables.description: How text_to_speech returns audio: files, resources, or both

environmentVariables.name: SUPERTONE_MCP_AUTOPLAY
environmentVariables.description: Auto-play generated audio on macOS via afplay (true by default)
